title: Household over 10y: $18/hr wage, $5,000 saved, 21.9% inflation
situation: A worker earning $18.50/hour for 40 hours grosses $740.00. They invest $5,000 at 5.00% compounded annually for 10 years, reaching $8,144.47. Over the same period CPI rose from 100.0 to 121.9 (21.90% inflation).

pre_run.summary: 3 independent domain verifiers each CONFIRMED their part.
